race.comment: Terrific finish originally with plenty of win chances but the scratchings have taken some of the better hopes out. With that in mind looks a great chance for PRANCING SPIRIT (4) to find best. Talented galloper from the in-form Stokes yard who has been thereabouts without winning and is well placed this line-up. Placed 3/3 course and distance and will be close to the pace. Should run well. FLYING MIKKI (3) scored a big win from the tail last time and looks tough to stop again. ALLINTHETIMING (7) is another with a big finish and will be winding up late.  FLYING VALLEY (1) returns from a break and is aided by the claim. Has won fresh and returns on the back of a second in a trial. Best form is soft ground and should run well.
